title: Wannabe
why_this_song: Wannabe by Spice Girls (1996) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 26 times; first heard in: "Yo, I'll tell you what I want, what I really, really want"
Appears 17 times; first heard in: "Yo, I'll tell you what I want, what I really, really want"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Slam your body down and wind it all around"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Yo, I'll tell you what I want, what I really, really want"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "If you wanna be my lover, you gotta get with my friends (gotta get with my friends)"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Make it last forever, friendship never ends
If you wanna be my lover, you have got to give
Taking is too easy, but that's the way it is
Oh what you think about that? Now you know how I feel
If you wanna be my lover
(You gotta, you gotta, you gotta, you gotta, you gotta slam)
Make it last forever (slam, slam, slam, slam)
Slam your body down and wind it all around

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "really" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "really" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "want" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "want" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I wanna really, really, really wanna "zig-a-zig", ah
Make it last forever, friendship never ends
And as for me, haha, you'll see

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Wannabe" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Wannabe" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Wannabe" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Wannabe", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Wannabe" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Wannabe" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
